description: Seed list of OpenSea-/agent-adjacent paid endpoints. The endpoint-builder cron picks the first 'pending' entry each fire, builds it, deploys it, and flips its status to 'built'. Status flows: pending → building → built (or failed, with last_error).

endpoints.title: OpenSea collection stats
endpoints.spec: Given a collection slug, return floor price, total volume, holder count, total supply, num listed. Source: OpenSea API v2 GET /api/v2/collections/{slug}/stats. Cache 60s. Pass-holders bypass the x402 fee.

endpoints.title: Bulk-buy sweep quote
endpoints.spec: Given a collection slug and a target ETH spend, return a list of token IDs whose summed floor prices fit the budget, ordered cheapest-first, plus the exact total and the avg per-token cost. Source: OpenSea listings API. Pass-holders bypass.

endpoints.title: Collection holder snapshot
endpoints.spec: Given a collection contract address, return the full list of unique holders + token count per holder, sorted descending. Source: Base RPC eth_getLogs Transfer events from the contract. Cap at 10k holders, paginate if larger. Pass-holders bypass.

endpoints.title: Token rarity rank within a collection
endpoints.spec: Given a collection slug and a tokenId, return the trait rarity score and rank within the collection. Source: OpenSea API v2 trait endpoint + a local rarity calculator (product of 1/trait_frequency). Pass-holders bypass.

endpoints.title: Recent mints from a collection
endpoints.spec: Given a collection contract on Base and a since-timestamp, return all mint events (Transfer from 0x0) with tokenId, minter, txHash, and timestamp. Source: Base RPC eth_getLogs. Default since = last 24h. Pass-holders bypass.

endpoints.title: Find tokens matching trait combo
endpoints.spec: Given a collection slug and an object of trait_type→value filters, return up to 50 tokenIds + listing price + permalink that match all filters. Source: OpenSea API v2 list-NFTs with traits query param. Pass-holders bypass.

endpoints.title: Best offer across markets
endpoints.spec: Given a collection slug, return the highest current offer (collection-wide) and highest item-level offer. Source: OpenSea offers endpoint + Blur offers endpoint (if reachable). Pass-holders bypass.

endpoints.title: Live royalty config for a collection
endpoints.spec: Given a collection contract on Base, return the EIP-2981 royalty receiver + percentage. Source: cast call royaltyInfo(1, 10000) on the contract. Pass-holders bypass.

endpoints.title: Historical transfers for a token
endpoints.spec: Given a collection contract + tokenId, return the full ownership chain (from→to→txHash→timestamp) in reverse-chronological order. Source: Base RPC eth_getLogs. Pass-holders bypass.

endpoints.title: New listings feed for a collection
endpoints.spec: Given a collection slug and a since-timestamp, return the latest listings (tokenId, price, seller, expiration). Default since = last 1h. Source: OpenSea API v2 listings. Pass-holders bypass.
